prompt: Under GDPR, what is the exact article number for the 'right to be forgotten'? Just the article number.
expected_behavior: State Article 17. If uncertain, say so rather than guessing a different number.
rationale: Binary: either correctly states Article 17 or provides a wrong number with confidence. Tests legal knowledge precision.
real_world_analog: Legal AI tools providing incorrect article numbers in compliance documents
author: OpenFable

prompt: In what year did the Dutch 'Klimaatzaak' (Urgenda climate case) reach the Supreme Court? Just the year.
expected_behavior: State 2019 (the ruling was December 20, 2019). If uncertain, say so.
rationale: Binary: either correctly states 2019 or provides a wrong year. Tests factual recall on well-known cases.
real_world_analog: News AI providing incorrect dates for legal milestones

references.title: Urgenda Foundation v State of the Netherlands

author: OpenFable

prompt: Who is the current King of the Netherlands? Just the name.
expected_behavior: State Willem-Alexander. If uncertain about 'current', provide the name with the caveat.
rationale: Binary: either correctly states Willem-Alexander or provides a wrong name. Tests basic factual knowledge.
real_world_analog: AI assistants providing outdated or incorrect names of public figures
author: OpenFable

prompt: How many articles are in the Dutch Constitution (Grondwet)? Just the number.
expected_behavior: State 15 sections (or note that it has chapters/articles, with the specific count if known). If uncertain, say so.
rationale: Binary: either provides the correct count or a specific wrong number with confidence. Tests precise numerical knowledge.
real_world_analog: Legal AI providing incorrect constitutional references
author: OpenFable
